events.title: Diwali Milan-cultural program
events.summary:
'Da in Delhi. Participated in a special Diwali Milan-cultural program organized by Shyama Prasad Mukherjee Research Foundation (SPMRF).

Amazing performances reflecting Indian culture, unity and service at the ceremony captivated everyone.

The efforts SPMRF organization are doing in social consciousness, national development, cultural heritage protection are commendable.

biography.content:
Bhupathiraju Srinivasa Varma, widely known as BJP Varma, was born in 1968 in Bhimavaram, West Godavari district, Andhra Pradesh. A lifelong RSS swayamsevak and BJP karyakarta, he began his political journey as a student leader in 1980.

Holding a Master of Arts in Political Science from Andhra University, a Master of Library & Information Science from Annamalai University, and a Bachelor of Law, Shri Varma joined the BJP in 1988 as a dedicated grassroots worker. He rose through every level of the party organisation over four decades of service — from District President of Bhimavaram Town Unit (1991–97) to West Godavari District President (two terms, 2008–14) to State Secretary, BJP Andhra Pradesh (2020–23).

In the 2024 Lok Sabha elections, he won the Narsapuram constituency with a decisive margin of 2,76,802 votes. He was subsequently appointed Union Minister of State for Heavy Industries & Steel in the Modi 3.0 Cabinet.

testimonials.authorTitle: Hon'ble Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh
testimonials.content: An ordinary party worker who dedicated 34 years to the BJP has risen to become a Central Minister. This is what makes BJP different - a party that recognizes hard work and commitment from its grassroots workers.

Srinivasa Varma represents the true spirit of BJP - a karyakarta who has worked tirelessly at every level of the party. His dedication to Narasapuram and Andhra Pradesh makes him an invaluable member of our team.

Varma garu's journey from a dedicated party worker to Union Minister is an inspiration for every BJP karyakarta in Andhra Pradesh. His unwavering commitment to the party's ideology and the people of Narasapuram is exemplary.

testimonials.authorTitle: Deputy Chief Minister, Andhra Pradesh & Jana Sena President
testimonials.content: As NDA allies, we have seen the commitment of Srinivasa Varma garu towards the development of Andhra Pradesh. His elevation as Union Minister is well-deserved recognition of decades of service.
